channel.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 1st, 2022
item.description:
Web

  • 🔧 FirelordJSstars31 - Extremely High Precision Typescript Wrapper for Firestore Web. (Admin versionstars18)
  • 🔧 FireSwordstars0 - Filter Firestore and RTDB unknown keys or keys with incorrect data types recursively, support all field values and special data types. (For web and admin)

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 7th, 2022
item.description:
Web

  • 🔧 FireSageJSstars0 - Extreme Type Safe For Realtime Database Web.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jun 21st, 2022
item.description:
Follow

Community

  • 📹 Fireship - A YouTube channel by Jeff Delaney, a Google Firebase expert and creator of the famous "X in 100 Seconds" videos.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Feb 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Featured (new releases)

  • 🔧 (Unofficial) Firebase Admin SDK for PHPstars1.8k - The Firebase Admin PHP SDK enables access to Firebase services from privileged environments (such as servers or cloud) in PHP.

    • Mobile

  • 📝 App Distribution App Bundles - Support for Android App Bundles (AAB) is officially supported in App Distribution.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 📖 Storage in Emulator Suite - Emulator suite is now complete!

    • Other

  • 🔧 FireCMS - FireCMS is an open source headless CMS and admin panel built by developers for developers. It generates CRUD views based on your configuration.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jul 6th, 2021
item.description:
Firebase Extensions

  • 🔧 Firebase Extensions - Firebase Extensions provide extended functionality to your apps without the need to research, write, or debug code on your own.
  • 🔧 Experimental Firebase Extensionsstars220 - laboratory for new extensions created by Firebase.
  • 🔧 Typesense Extension for Full-Text Searchstars91 - Official Typesense extension to add full-text search in Firestore, by syncing the data to Typesensestars11.3k, an OSS alternative to Algolia.
  • 🔧 Stripe Extensionsstars289 - Official Stripe subscriptions and invoices extensions.
  • 🔧 MessageBird Extensionsstars10 - Official MessageBird extension to send messages via the MessageBird Converstations API.
  • 🔧 Algolia Extensionsstars67 - Official Algolia extension to enable full text search of Cloud Firestore with Algolia.
  • 🔧 Mailchimp Extensionsstars12 - Official Mailchimp extension to sync Firebase Authentication events to create member tags, merge fields, and member events with Mailchimp.

    • Featured (new releases)

  • 📖 App Check - Protect your backend resources from abuse, such as billing fraud or phishing.
  • 📖 Modular Web SDK (v9) - Import only what you need reducing SDK size up to 80%.
  • 📖 Firestore Data Bundles - Data Bundles are static query results for CDN caching to speed first page loads.

    • Web

  • 🔌 GeoFirestorestars490 - Location-based querying and filtering using Firebase Firestore.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 asdf-firebasestars9 - An asdf-vm plugin for firebase-tools. Manage your Firebase CLI without Node.js or npm! Great for python, golang, c++ & java Firebase projects.

    • Other

  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2020 - All Firebase talks @ the Firebase Summit 2020.

    • Follow

    Official

  • 📹 Firebase YouTube
  • 📝 Firebase Blog
  • 🐦 @firebase
  • 👤 Firebase Facebook
  • 🔊 The Firebase Podcast - This is the place where we dive deep into Firebase products and learn new tips and tricks along the way.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jun 2nd, 2021
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firefoo - Cloud Firestore GUI Admin Tool with JSON/CSV Export and JavaScript Query Shell.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Apr 16th, 2021
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 📝 Refi App - A GUI tool to make developers less painful when interacting with Firestore DB

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Dec 13th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 Firestore Litestars208 - Lightweight Cloud Firestore library for the browser.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Nov 9th, 2020
item.description:
Server-side (Cloud Functions, BigQuery etc)

  • 💡 Express Server on Cloud Functions - Host an Express server on Cloud Functions.
  • 💡 Compiled Code with Cloud Functions - Compile your Flow, TypeScript or ReasonML to the correct Node runtime using Babel, TypeScript Compiler or ParcelJS.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 28th, 2020
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 📖 Firebase Tools UIstars206 - Web UI for Firebase Emulator Suite.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 SvelteFirestars583 - Cybernetically enhanced Firebase apps.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Other

  • 📹 Firebase Live 2020 - Firebase Live is a web series for app developers consisting of talks, tips, and technical tutorials aimed at increasing their productivity, knowledge, and collaboration.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 28th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔧 Remote Styles with Remote Configstars64 - Dynamic/Conditional loading of CSS stored in Remote Config. (Launch post).

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 18th, 2020
item.description:
Follow

Community

  • 🔥 Firebase Developers Discord - an open community dedicated to Firebase and its services, where you can to socialize and help other web and app developers from around the world.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 8th, 2020
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firecodestars35 - VS Code Firestore Rules Extension.
  • 🔧 VSFirestars75 - Deprecated VSCode extension for syntax highlighting & code completions with Firestore security rules & indexes.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 1st, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔌 Flamingostars117 - A Firebase Firestore model framework for Dart.

    • Other

  • 🔧 Flankstars606 - Massively parallel Android and iOS test runner for Firebase Test Lab.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Aug 26th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔌 FlutterFirestars7.2k - Collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Aug 12th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 firebase-kotlin-sdkstars499 - Kotlin-first SDK for Firebase supporting multiplatform projects (ios, android & js).

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firetablestars3.6k - Excel/Google Sheets like UI for Firebase/Firestore. No more admin portals!

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jun 8th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔧 Typesaurusstars313 - Type-safe TypeScript-first ODM for Firestore.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Apr 18th, 2020
item.description:
Official Docs & Quickstarts

  • 📖 Firebase for Games - New Firebase for Games landing page with links to Firebase/Google resources for game developers.

    • Games

  • 📖 Firestore for C++ and Unity - C++ and Unity SDKs for C++ and Unity (with Firebase Unity SDKs available via Unity Package Manager).

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Mar 24th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔧 Firebase App Distribution - Distribute pre-release versions of your app to your trusted testers.

    • Mobile

    Android

  • 🔌 Firecoilstars35 - Load images from GCS in your Android app using the image loading library Coil.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Mar 18th, 2020
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Svarogstars35 - Cloud Firestore schema validation with JSON Schema generated Security Rule helper functions.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Feb 14th, 2020
item.description:
Other

  • 🔌 Firestore Query Browser - WebApp to Query, (Batch-)Edit & Export documents with app & user switching.
  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2019 - All Firebase talks @ the Firebase Summit 2019.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Feb 11th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 React Firestars3.1k - Official Firebase React library with Hooks, Context Providers, and Components that make it easy to interact with Firebase.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 12th, 2019
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 React Firebase Hooksstars2.9k - React Hooks for Firebase services.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 VSCode Firebase Explorerstars135 - Explore and manage your Firebase projects.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 9th, 2019
item.description:
Official Docs & Quickstarts

  • 📖 Firebase Documentation - Official Firebase Documentation.
  • 🔧 Firebase Status Dashboard - This page provides status information on the services that are part of Firebase.
  • 💡 Firebase Quickstarts - Official Firebase Quickstarts.
  • 💡 Google Codelabs | Firebase - Google Developers Codelabs provide a guided, tutorial, hands-on coding experience.

    • Web

  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars4.1k - FirebaseUI is an open-source JavaScript library for Web that provides simple, customizable UI bindings on top of Firebase SDKs to eliminate boilerplate code and promote best practices.
  • 🔌 Firebase UI for Reactstars1.1k - React Wrapper for firebaseUI Web.
  • 🔌 GeoFire for JavaScriptstars1.4k - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 💡 FirePadstars3.7k - Collaborative Text Editor Powered by Firebase.
  • 🔌 Ember Firestars693 - Official Ember data adapter for Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase Dartstars408 - Dart wrapper for Firebase.
  • 🔌 PolymerFirestars462 - Polymer Web Components for Firebase.
  • 🔌 VueFirestars3.3k - Firebase bindings for Vue.js.
  • 🔌 Angular Fire 2stars7.3k - Official library for Firebase and Angular.
  • 🔌 Re-basestars2.2k - Relay inspired library for building React.js + Firebase applications.
  • 🔌 React Redux Firebasestars2.5k - Redux bindings for Firebase. Includes Higher Order Component for use with React.
  • 🔌 GatsbyJS Firebase Data Source - Query your Firebase data right into your statically generated pages with Gatsby.
  • 🔌 Apollo Link Firebasestars413 - Provides a local GraphQL interface to RealtimeDB. DB syncs locally to device, Apollo Link provides querying into the local DB.
  • 🔌 BuckleScript Bindings for Firebasestars43 - BuckleScript bindings for Firebase for use in ReasonML projects.
  • 💡 Angular Firebase PWAstars922 - Is an Angular PWA powered by Firebase. It can serve as a foundation to learn this stack and roll out more complex features.
  • 🔌 FireSQLstars344 - Query Firestore using SQL syntax. Issues the minimum amount of queries necessary in order to get the data that you request.
  • 📖 Hosting Version History - Automatic deletion of older versions of your site deployments.
  • 🔌 Firestorterstars375 - Use Firestore in React with zero effort, using MobX (also for react-native).
  • 💡 Nextbasestars14 - Boilerplate of Next.js, Redux & Firebase for developers who want a quick start project.

    • Mobile

  • 📖 Firebase Flutter Documentation - Official Firebase Flutter Setup.
  • 🔌 NativeScript plugin Firebasestars1k - NativeScript plugin for Firebase.
  • 🔌 React Native Firebasestars10.4k - Well-tested feature rich modular Firebase implementation for React Native. Supports both iOS & Android platforms.
  • 🔌 React Native Firebase Cloud Messagingstars1.7k - React Native module for Firebase Cloud Messaging and local notification.
  • 💡 Expo Native Firebasestars208 - Native Firebase Expo App (iOS, Android) Demo for Firestore, Notifications, Analytics, Storage, Messaging, Database.
  • 💡 Flutter Calendar Appstars75 - New Flutter application implementing a simple mobile calendar app for storing basic events into Firebase cloud database.

    • Mobile

    Android

  • 🔌 GeoFire for Javastars671 - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars4.4k - Optimized UI components for Firebase.
  • 🔌 FireXtensionsstars29 - Unofficial Kotlin Extensions for the Firebase Android SDK.

    • Mobile

    iOS

  • 🔌 GeoFire for Objective-Cstars439 - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars1.4k - iOS UI bindings for Firebase.
  • 💡 MLKit - ARCorestars11 - Example detecting objects and tags them with 3D labels in Augmented Reality. Uses Firebase ML Kit, ARCore and Firebase RTDB.
  • 💡 MLKit - ARKitstars31 - Example detecting objects using Firebase ML Kit and tags them with 3D labels in Augmented Reality.

    • Server-side (Cloud Functions, BigQuery etc)

  • 📖 Firebase Admin Documentation - Official Firebase Admin SDK Server Setup.
  • 💡 Functions Samplesstars11.2k - Collection of sample apps showcasing popular use cases using Cloud Functions for Firebase.
  • 📝 GraphQL Server on Cloud Functions - Host an Express server with GraphQL middleware on Cloud Functions.
  • 📝 BigQuery & Google Analytics - How Do I Create a Closed Funnel in Google Analytics for Firebase Using BigQuery.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firebase Toolsstars3.5k - The Firebase Command Line Tools.
  • 🔧 Firebase CIstars72 - Simplified Firebase interaction for continuous integration.
  • 🔧 Firebase Firestore Snippetsstars13 - Contains the snippet for both Firebase and Firestore in VS Code editor.
  • 🔧 Fuegostars178 - Firestore client CLI supporting document add/update/query with filtering and pagination.
  • 🔧 Firestore Rules Generatorstars190 - Official (but experimental) Firebase Rules Generator for Cloud Firestore based on Google's Protocol Buffer format.
  • 🔧 Firepitstars26 - Firepit is a standalone, portable version of the Firebase CLI which has no depedencies (including Node.js).
  • 🔧 Firewardstars222 - Easy to use language for Firestore rules, similar to Firebase Bolt.

    • Other

  • 🔌 FireDrillstars56 - Find, Edit, Add, Remove, Import, Export, and Report on your Firebase data.
  • 💡 Unity Solutionsstars115 - Use Firebase tools to incorporate common features into your games.
  • 🔌 Firebase AIR Native Extensionstars57 - Firebase ANE collection give you access to the Google Firebase project in your AdobeAir projects supported on both Android and iOS with 100% identical ActionScript API.
  • 🔌 QtFirebasestars256 - An effort to bring Google's Firebase C++ API to Qt + QML.
  • 📝 StackBlitz to Firebase Hosting Deployments - StackBlitz (online code editor) to Firebase Hosting static deployments.
  • 🔧 Flamelink - CMS for Firebase. Supports Firestore, RealtimeDatabase & Storage.
  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2018 - All Firebase Summit 2018 talks.
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google Cloud Next '18 - All Firebase talks @ Google Cloud Next 2018.
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google IO '18 - All Firebase talks @ Google IO 2018.
  • 📹 #AskFirebase YouTube Playlist - Official #AskFirebase playlist on YouTube.
  • 📝 State of Firebase (mid 2019) - Cloud Next & Google I/O 2019 updates!
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google IO '19 - All Firebase talks @ Google IO 2019.

    • Follow

    Community

  • 📹 ru @firebase_ru - Telegram friendly chat
